title: Multi-page survey with cross-page branching
description: Questions split across pages. visibleIf can reference an answer from an earlier page, so a whole page's question can be gated on a prior response. Page boundaries are presentation only — the warehouse flattens elements across pages (dbt walks pages[].elements[]).

elements.name: pet_count
elements.title: How many pets do you have?
elements.description: Reachable only when has_pets = 'yes', answered on the previous page.

elements.name: pet_names
elements.title: Tell us about them.
elements.description: Free text about pets can reveal household details; left at the default pii_risk 'high'.
